{{Quote|Tell me, Commander, how would you feel if I were to tell you that most Chiss I've met have been arrogant and condescending.|[[Arien Yage]]|<ref name="Force Heretic II" />}}
[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Hess'irolia'nuruodo''', also known by her [[Core name/Legends|core name]] '''Irolia''', was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chiss officer/Legends|officer]] who served in the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force|Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet]] of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|As an officer of the Expansionary Defense Force, I believe it is my duty to ensure the safety and security of the Chiss realm. That directive, as you are well aware, supersedes all others.|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Irolia|<ref name="Force Heretic II" />}}
In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Irolia was in command of a [[Corvette/Legends|Chiss corvette]] that intercepted the ''[[Jade Shadow]]'' during its mission to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], and escorted it to [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]]. To the eyes of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], she seemed no older than his niece [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]], then twenty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old—she may even have been younger.<ref name="Force Heretic II" />

==Equipment==
Irolia claimed to be an [[Chiss officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]],<ref name="Force Heretic II" /> but instead of the predominantly black jumpsuits of most CEDF officers,<ref name="Survivor's Quest">''[[Survivor's Quest]]''</ref> she wore a burgundy-and-black uniform,<ref name="Force Heretic II" /> a color scheme previously only seen among the [[Chiss warrior/Legends|Chiss warriors]] from [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo's Household Phalanx]].<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref> Her uniform bore an [[Symbol of the Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|insignia]] of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]].<ref name="Force Heretic II" /> Also, her ship was escorted by [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|''Nssis''-class Clawcraft]], hybrid TIE-series starfighters that had previously only been seen in combat with House Phalanx forces.

==Behind the scenes==
Hess'irolia'nuruodo first appeared in the [[2003]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'', the second book in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']]{{'s}} [[Force Heretic trilogy|''Force Heretic'' trilogy]], written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]]. Although [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Hess'irolia'nuruodo was described wearing a burgundy-and-black uniform in ''Force Heretic II: Refugee'',<ref name="Force Heretic II">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''</ref> a color scheme previously only seen among the Chiss warriors from Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo's Household Phalanx,<ref name="Vision of the Future" /> her depiction in the ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' has her wear a [[Defense Fleet uniform]] with [[Red Flame (symbol)|red piping]] along her arms that represented the [[Red Flame]] ideal.<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
